option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# ✅ Frontend Developer Checklist
## What You Received
- [x] **2 Working APIs** for user profile and password management - [x] **Complete documentation** with examples - [x] **JSON API specification** (frontend-api-spec.json) - [x] **Swagger UI** at http://localhost:8080/api/v1/docs - [x] **Postman collection** example
---
## Implementation Checklist
### Phase 1: Setup (5-10 min) - [ ] Review SUMMARY-FOR-FRONTEND.md - [ ] Test APIs in Swagger UI - [ ] Save access token format reference - [ ] Understand error codes (401, 400, 404, 500)
### Phase 2: Profile Page (30-45 min) - [ ] Create Profile component/page - [ ] Add API call to `/api/v1/users/info` - [ ] Include `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header - [ ] Handle loading state - [ ] Handle 401 error → redirect to login - [ ] Display user data (email, name, roles) - [ ] Handle null firstName/lastName gracefully - [ ] Format createdAt date nicely - [ ] Add "Change Password" button - [ ] Test on mobile and desktop
### Phase 3: Change Password Page (30-45 min) - [ ] Create ChangePassword component/page - [ ] Add form with 3 password fields - [ ] Add client-side validation: - [ ] All fields required - [ ] New password min 8 characters - [ ] Confirm matches new password - [ ] New different from current - [ ] Add API call to `/api/v1/users/change-password` - [ ] Include `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header - [ ] Handle loading state during submit - [ ] Show validation errors from backend - [ ] Show success message - [ ] Clear form after success - [ ] Test all error scenarios - [ ] Test on mobile and desktop
### Phase 4: Integration (15-20 min) - [ ] Add navigation: Profile ↔ Change Password - [ ] Store user profile in global state (Redux/Context) - [ ] Fetch profile once on app load - [ ] Show user name in header/navbar - [ ] Add logout functionality - [ ] Test complete flow: Login → Profile → Change Password → Logout → Login with new password
### Phase 5: Polish (15-20 min) - [ ] Add loading spinners - [ ] Add success/error toast messages - [ ] Add form validation feedback - [ ] Style components consistently - [ ] Add icons (avatar, lock, edit, etc.) - [ ] Test keyboard navigation - [ ] Test screen reader accessibility - [ ] Add empty states if needed
---
## Testing Checklist
### Manual Testing: - [ ] Login with test account - [ ] Navigate to profile page - [ ] Verify all user data displays correctly - [ ] Verify null firstName/lastName show fallback - [ ] Click "Change Password" - [ ] Try submitting empty form → should show errors - [ ] Try non-matching passwords → should show error - [ ] Try wrong current password → should show backend error - [ ] Try valid password change → should succeed - [ ] Verify success message shows - [ ] Verify form clears after success - [ ] Go back to profile → verify still logged in - [ ] Logout - [ ] Login with NEW password → should work - [ ] Login with OLD password → should fail
### Edge Cases: - [ ] Test with user with no firstName/lastName - [ ] Test with very long names - [ ] Test with special characters in name - [ ] Test token expiry (wait 15 min) → should get 401 - [ ] Test rapid form submissions - [ ] Test browser back button behavior - [ ] Test page refresh on profile page
### Cross-Browser: - [ ] Chrome - [ ] Firefox - [ ] Safari - [ ] Edge
### Responsive: - [ ] Mobile (320px) - [ ] Tablet (768px) - [ ] Desktop (1024px+)
---
## Code Review Checklist
### Security: - [ ] Access token never logged to console - [ ] Access token not exposed in UI - [ ] 401 errors clear localStorage - [ ] 401 errors redirect to login - [ ] HTTPS used in production - [ ] No sensitive data in URLs
### Code Quality: - [ ] No hardcoded URLs (use config/env) - [ ] Error handling on all API calls - [ ] Loading states for all async operations - [ ] Proper TypeScript types (if using TS) - [ ] Components are reusable - [ ] Code follows project conventions - [ ] No console.log left in code - [ ] Comments on complex logic
### UX: - [ ] Clear error messages - [ ] Helpful validation feedback - [ ] Loading indicators - [ ] Success confirmations - [ ] Consistent button placement - [ ] Keyboard accessible - [ ] Mobile-friendly touch targets - [ ] Proper focus management
---
## Quick Reference
### Get Profile: ```javascript GET /api/v1/users/info Header: Authorization: Bearer <token> ```
### Change Password: ```javascript PUT /api/v1/users/change-password Header: Authorization: Bearer <token> Body: { currentPassword, newPassword, confirmPassword } ```
### Handle 401: ```javascript if (response.status === 401) { localStorage.clear(); navigate('/login'); } ```
### Display Name: ```javascript profile.fullName || profile.firstName || profile.email ```
---
## ⏱️ Time Estimates
- **Total Implementation:** 2-3 hours - **Testing:** 30-60 minutes - **Polish & Fixes:** 30-60 minutes - **Total:** 3-5 hours
---
## Definition of Done
### Profile Page: ✅ Shows user data correctly ✅ Handles loading state ✅ Handles errors gracefully ✅ Responsive on all screen sizes ✅ Accessible (keyboard navigation, screen readers) ✅ Button to change password works
### Change Password Page: ✅ Form validates all inputs ✅ Shows clear error messages ✅ Shows success message ✅ Clears form after success ✅ Responsive on all screen sizes ✅ Accessible ✅ Cancel button goes back
### Integration: ✅ Profile fetched once on app load ✅ User name shows in navbar ✅ Navigation works smoothly ✅ Token expiry handled (401 → login) ✅ Password change works end-to-end ✅ Can login with new password after change
---
## Ready to Ship When:
- [x] All checkboxes above checked ✅ - [x] Code reviewed by peer ✅ - [x] Tested on all browsers ✅ - [x] Tested on mobile ✅ - [x] No console errors ✅ - [x] Backend APIs working ✅ - [x] Ready for production
---
## Need Help?
### Backend is Ready: ✅ APIs working and tested ✅ Swagger docs available ✅ Error codes documented ✅ Security implemented
### Documentation: SUMMARY-FOR-FRONTEND.md - Overview frontend-quick-reference.md - Quick snippets frontend-integration-guide.md - Detailed guide api-testing-examples.md - Test examples frontend-api-spec.json - JSON specification
---
**Now go build it! You got this! **

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Frontend Integration Documentation Index
## Start Here
**New to these APIs?** → Read this file first!
---
## Documentation Files
### 1️⃣ **SUMMARY-FOR-FRONTEND.md** ⭐ START HERE **What:** Complete overview of both APIs **When to use:** First time understanding what's available **Time to read:** 5-10 minutes **Contains:** - API specifications - Request/response examples - Error handling guide - Quick start code - FAQ section
---
### 2️⃣ **frontend-quick-reference.md** ⚡ QUICK ACCESS **What:** Copy-paste ready code snippets **When to use:** When you need quick code examples **Time to read:** 2 minutes **Contains:** - Endpoint URLs - Headers format - Request/response samples - Copy-paste JavaScript code - Error code table
---
### 3️⃣ **frontend-integration-guide.md** DETAILED GUIDE **What:** Complete implementation guide with examples **When to use:** When implementing the features **Time to read:** 15-20 minutes **Contains:** - React/TypeScript examples - Angular examples - Complete component code - Hooks and services - UI/UX recommendations - Best practices
---
### 4️⃣ **api-testing-examples.md** TESTING **What:** API testing instructions **When to use:** When testing APIs before integration **Time to read:** 10 minutes **Contains:** - cURL commands - Postman collection - Swagger UI guide - Test scenarios - Complete test flow
---
### 5️⃣ **frontend-api-spec.json** MACHINE READABLE **What:** JSON specification of APIs **When to use:** Reference for tools/code generators **Format:** JSON **Contains:** - Endpoint definitions - Request/response schemas - Error codes and examples - Code snippets - Common patterns
---
### 6️⃣ **FRONTEND-CHECKLIST.md** ✅ IMPLEMENTATION CHECKLIST **What:** Step-by-step checklist for implementation **When to use:** During development and testing **Time to complete:** 3-5 hours **Contains:** - Setup tasks - Implementation steps - Testing checklist - Code review checklist - Definition of done
---
## Recommended Reading Order
### **For Quick Start (10 minutes):** 1. SUMMARY-FOR-FRONTEND.md 2. frontend-quick-reference.md 3. Start coding!
### **For Complete Implementation (30 minutes):** 1. SUMMARY-FOR-FRONTEND.md 2. api-testing-examples.md (test in Swagger first) 3. frontend-integration-guide.md 4. FRONTEND-CHECKLIST.md (use during development)
### **For Testing Only:** 1. api-testing-examples.md 2. Use Swagger UI: http://localhost:8080/api/v1/docs
---
## What Each Role Should Read
### **Frontend Developer (Implementing):** ✅ SUMMARY-FOR-FRONTEND.md ✅ frontend-integration-guide.md ✅ FRONTEND-CHECKLIST.md frontend-quick-reference.md (for reference)
### **QA/Tester:** ✅ api-testing-examples.md ✅ FRONTEND-CHECKLIST.md (testing section) SUMMARY-FOR-FRONTEND.md (error codes)
### **Tech Lead (Reviewing):** ✅ SUMMARY-FOR-FRONTEND.md ✅ frontend-api-spec.json frontend-integration-guide.md (best practices)
### **Backend Developer:** ✅ All files are ready! APIs are documented. Can point frontend team to this index.
---
## File Locations
All files are in: `reputeai/docs/`
``` reputeai/docs/ ├── README-DOCUMENTATION-INDEX.md (this file) ├── SUMMARY-FOR-FRONTEND.md ├── frontend-quick-reference.md ├── frontend-integration-guide.md ├── api-testing-examples.md ├── frontend-api-spec.json └── FRONTEND-CHECKLIST.md ```
---
## Quick Links
### **API Endpoints:** - **Profile:** `GET /api/v1/users/info` - **Password:** `PUT /api/v1/users/change-password`
### **Documentation:** - **Swagger UI:** http://localhost:8080/api/v1/docs - **Base URL:** http://localhost:8080
### **Authentication:** - **Type:** Bearer Token - **Header:** `Authorization: Bearer <token>` - **Expiry:** 15 minutes
---
## ❓ Which File Should I Read?
### **"I need to implement the profile page"** → Read: frontend-integration-guide.md (React/Angular examples)
### **"I need quick copy-paste code"** → Read: frontend-quick-reference.md
### **"I want to test the APIs first"** → Read: api-testing-examples.md or use Swagger UI
### **"I'm new and need an overview"** → Read: SUMMARY-FOR-FRONTEND.md
### **"I need the full technical spec"** → Read: frontend-api-spec.json
### **"I'm implementing and need a checklist"** → Read: FRONTEND-CHECKLIST.md
---
## File Comparison
| File | Length | Detail Level | Audience | Format | |------|--------|--------------|----------|--------| | SUMMARY | Medium | High-level | Everyone | Markdown | | Quick Reference | Short | Essential only | Developers | Markdown | | Integration Guide | Long | Very detailed | Developers | Markdown | | Testing Examples | Medium | Step-by-step | QA/Devs | Markdown | | API Spec | Long | Complete spec | Tools/Review | JSON | | Checklist | Medium | Action items | Developers | Markdown |
---
## ✅ What's Included
### **Request/Response Examples:** ✅ - JSON request bodies - Success responses - Error responses - All HTTP status codes
### **Code Examples:** ✅ - JavaScript/TypeScript - React hooks & components - Angular services & components - cURL commands - Postman collection
### **Error Handling:** ✅ - All error codes documented - Error messages explained - Handling instructions - Edge cases covered
### **Security:** ✅ - Authentication explained - Token management - Best practices - Security checklist
### **Testing:** ✅ - Manual test steps - Postman examples - Swagger instructions - Test scenarios
---
## Everything You Need
✅ **APIs:** 2 endpoints (profile, password) ✅ **Documentation:** 6 comprehensive files ✅ **Examples:** React, Angular, Vanilla JS ✅ **Testing:** Postman, Swagger, cURL ✅ **Checklist:** Step-by-step guide ✅ **Specification:** JSON format
**You have everything needed to integrate successfully!**
---
## Support
### **APIs Ready:** ✅ - Fully tested and working - Production-ready - Secure implementation - Error handling complete
### **Documentation Complete:** ✅ - All use cases covered - Multiple examples provided - Testing instructions included - Best practices documented
---
## Next Steps
1. **Read** SUMMARY-FOR-FRONTEND.md (5 min) 2. **Test** APIs in Swagger UI (5 min) 3. **Review** frontend-integration-guide.md (15 min) 4. **Implement** using FRONTEND-CHECKLIST.md (3-5 hours) 5. **Test** thoroughly 6. **Deploy** to production!
---
**Ready to start? Open SUMMARY-FOR-FRONTEND.md and let's go! **
